mapper.insert: insert into esg.tb_legal_review (write_year , doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, legal_review_nm, use_yn, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) values(#{writeYear} , #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{legalReviewNm}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, now(), #{updatedBy})

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(doc_seq), 5)::INTEGER, 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_legal_review_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
insert into esg.tb_legal_review_detail (write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, legal_write_year, legal_doc_type, legal_doc_no, legal_doc_seq, revision_at, currentLaws, facility, remark_dc, use_yn, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by) values(#{writeYear} , #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{legalWriteYear}, #{legalDocType}, #{legalDocNo}, #{legalDocSeq}, #{revisionAt}, #{currentlaws}, #{facility}, #{remarkDc}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, now(), #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: update esg.tb_legal_review_detail set legal_write_year = #{legalWriteYear}, legal_doc_type = #{legalDocType}, legal_doc_no = #{legalDocNo}, legal_doc_seq = #{legalDocSeq}, revision_at = #{revisionAt}, currentLaws = #{currentlaws}, facility = #{facility}, remark_dc = #{remarkDc}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_legal_review_detail_orgn( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, orgn_id, orgn_nm, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{orgnId}, #{orgnNm}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT t1.legal_review_nm, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY t2.doc_no, t2.doc_seq ASC)::text AS doc_seq, t2.write_year, t3.article_title AS legalArticleNm, t2.revision_at, t2.currentlaws, t2.facility, t2.remark_dc, STRING_AGG(t4.orgn_nm, E'\n' ORDER BY t4.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, t5.legal_nm FROM esg.tb_legal_review t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_review_detail t2 ON t1.write_year = t2.write_year AND t1.doc_no = t2.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_manage_detail t3 ON t2.legal_write_year = t3.write_year AND t2.legal_doc_type = t3.doc_type AND t2.legal_doc_no = t3.doc_no AND t2.legal_doc_seq = t3.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_review_detail_orgn t4 ON t2.doc_seq = t4.doc_seq AND t1.doc_no = t4.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_legal_manage t5 ON t3.doc_no = t5.doc_no AND t1.comp_id = t5.comp_id WHERE t1.write_year = #{writeYear} AND t1.doc_no = #{docNo} GROUP BY t1.legal_review_nm, t2.write_year, t2.doc_no, t2.doc_seq, t3.article_title, t2.revision_at, t2.currentlaws, t2.facility, t2.remark_dc, t5.legal_nm ORDER BY t2.doc_no, t2.doc_seq ASC;
